nasb.text: Then you are not the Egyptian who some time ago stirred up a revolt and led the four thousand men of the Assassins out into the wilderness?”

esv.text: Are you not the Egyptian, then, who recently stirred up a revolt and led the four thousand men of the Assassins out into the wilderness?”

cnv.text: 難道你不就是不久以前作亂的、帶領四千個殺手到曠野去的那個埃及人嗎？”

ccb.text: 不久前煽动叛乱、带着四千暴徒逃到旷野去的那个埃及人是你吗？”

csbs.text: 你究竟是不是那个前些日子作乱、带领四千个凶徒进入旷野的埃及人呢？”
